name: testCreateUserAccount
description: Verify that user account was created successfully and user was redirected to the main page
descriptionHtml: Verify that user account was created successfully and user was redirected to the main page

testStage.description: Verify that user account was created successfully and user was redirected to the main page

steps.name: Fill all mandatory fields in the signup form
Verify that account was created successfully
Click the Continue button on the Account Created page
Verify that user was redirected to the main page
